<!-- Generated by diagram-updater | Date: 2026-04-06 | Source: docs/specs/2026-04-06-worktree-auto-merge-cleanup/spec.md -->

# Worktree Auto-Merge and Cleanup — Sequence Diagram

Sequence diagram showing the post-session merge and deferred cleanup workflow.

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
    participant Session as Claude Code
    participant Hook as session:end Hook
    participant WorkflowBin as ecc-workflow
    participant GitRepo as Git Repo
    participant GC as ecc worktree gc
    participant FS as File System

    Session->>Hook: session ends
    activate Hook
    Hook->>Hook: detect in_worktree
    Hook->>GitRepo: git rev-list (count commits)
    GitRepo-->>Hook: commit_count
    alt commit_count == 0
        Hook->>FS: [skip merge, log deferred]
        Hook-->>Session: passthrough (cleanup deferred)
    else commits exist
        Hook->>WorkflowBin: run ecc-workflow merge
        activate WorkflowBin
        WorkflowBin->>GitRepo: git rebase main
        alt rebase fails
            WorkflowBin->>GitRepo: git rebase --abort
            WorkflowBin-->>Hook: error + recovery file
            Hook->>FS: write .ecc-merge-recovery
            Hook-->>Session: warn (merge failed)
        else rebase succeeds
            WorkflowBin->>GitRepo: cargo build
            WorkflowBin->>GitRepo: cargo test
            WorkflowBin->>GitRepo: cargo clippy
            alt verify fails
                WorkflowBin-->>Hook: error + recovery file
                Hook->>FS: write .ecc-merge-recovery
                Hook-->>Session: warn (verify failed)
            else verify succeeds
                WorkflowBin->>GitRepo: git checkout main
                WorkflowBin->>GitRepo: git merge --ff-only (worktree-branch)
                alt ff-merge succeeds
                    WorkflowBin-->>Hook: success
                    Hook-->>Session: warn (merged successfully)
                    Note over Hook,GC: Branch deletion and<br/>worktree cleanup<br/>deferred to gc
                else ff-merge fails
                    WorkflowBin-->>Hook: error
                    Hook->>FS: write .ecc-merge-recovery
                    Hook-->>Session: warn (merge failed)
                end
            end
        end
        deactivate WorkflowBin
    end
    deactivate Hook

    Note over Session,GC: ... next session start ...

    Session->>GC: ecc worktree gc (at session start)
    activate GC
    GC->>GitRepo: git worktree list --porcelain
    GitRepo-->>GC: [list of worktrees]
    loop for each worktree
        alt matches ecc-session-* pattern
            GC->>GC: check: is_stale? (age > 24h OR pid dead)
            alt stale
                GC->>GitRepo: git worktree remove --force
                GC->>GitRepo: git branch -D (associated branch)
                GC-->>FS: [removed]
            else fresh
                GC-->>FS: [skipped]
            end
        else not a session worktree
            GC-->>FS: [pass through]
        end
    end
    deactivate GC
```
